subject: A pale, bone-white Eldrazi drone with an elongated angular head, segmented insectile limbs, and a hunched predatory posture, standing amid forest undergrowth and scattered debris
description: A gaunt, pale-white Eldrazi creature dominates the frame, its body a collage of bone-like plating, elongated limbs, and a sharp angular head that recalls a stylized skull or mask. The creature crouches forward with predatory intent, its segmented arms extended. Behind it, a muted greenish-grey forest backdrop suggests it operates in the wild rather than the void. Scattered debris and broken matter litter the foreground — implying recent consumption or repurposing of organic material. The palette is dominated by sickly off-whites, bone greys, and forest greens, with the Eldrazi rendered in higher contrast than its surroundings, making it pop as an unnatural intruder in a natural setting.
foreground: pale segmented Eldrazi drone amid scattered debris
background: muted greenish-grey forest with hazy undergrowth
